introSection: The Joker is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. The ride opened on May 30, 2016.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The Joker was announced on September 3, 2015. It opened on May 30, 2016.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Joker is a hybrid conversion of the park's former Great Coasters International wooden roller coaster Roar which has three inversions, two of which are first time used: step-up under flip and barrel roll. Changes that the ride underwent during its conversion include an increase in height from to, an increase in speed from  to  and an increase in drop angle from 45° to 78°, along with the addition of three inversions to the ride.

fullText:
The Joker is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. The ride opened on May 30, 2016.

The Joker was announced on September 3, 2015. It opened on May 30, 2016.

The Joker is a hybrid conversion of the park's former Great Coasters International wooden roller coaster Roar which has three inversions, two of which are first time used: step-up under flip and barrel roll. Changes that the ride underwent during its conversion include an increase in height from to, an increase in speed from  to  and an increase in drop angle from 45° to 78°, along with the addition of three inversions to the ride.
